sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19345" key="barbarokto/nos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βαρβᾰρο-κτόνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n19345.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">slaughtering barbarians,</tr_> Thom.Mag.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.141</biblScope> </bibl> R.</sense> </entryFree>
